title: Charitha Kamakshi
overview: Charitha is an innocent girl begins her married life with a passionate filmmaker. As she tries to adjust to her new love and world, she slowly discovers that although her husband is kind at heart, he is morally compromised in his profession. His choices eventually land him in police custody. With little knowledge of the outside world, she must step beyond her innocence and confront a stubborn Sub-Inspector to bring him back
